title: Particl has been selected for Delta Direct
excerpt: Now live to over 1 Million users on both iOS & Android!
custom_excerpt: Now live to over 1 Million users on both iOS & Android!

primary_tag.name: News & Updates
primary_tag.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

plaintext:
Now live to over 1 Million users on both iOS & Android!
https://delta.app/download> A direct link for Token Teams to connect with existing
& potential future investors. Fully free.
Delta Direct users are now subscribed to Particl news and announcements!

 * All the latest PART updates will now be directly available on Delta Direct’s
   applications.

Android [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.getdelta.android]
Delta - Bitcoin & Cryptocurrency Portfolio Tracker - Apps on Google Play
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.getdelta.android]
Delta is the best free Bitcoin & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker app. Track
all
crypto assets, including Bitcoin…
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.getdelta.android]
play.google.com
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.getdelta.android]

IOS [https://itunes.apple.com/app/delta-crypto-ico-portfolio/id1288676542]
‎Delta Crypto Portfolio Tracker
[https://itunes.apple.com/app/delta-crypto-ico-portfolio/id1288676542]
‎Read reviews, compare customer ratings, see screenshots, and learn more about
Delta Crypto Portfolio Tracker. Download…
[https://itunes.apple.com/app/delta-crypto-ico-portfolio/id1288676542]
itunes.apple.com
[https://itunes.apple.com/app/delta-crypto-ico-portfolio/id1288676542]

Desktop [https://delta.app/download]
∆ Delta - The best Bitcoin, ICO & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker
[https://delta.app/download]
∆ Delta - The best Bitcoin, ICO & cryptocurrency portfolio trackerdelta.app
[https://delta.app/download]

 * Make sure to enable notifications for Direct updates so you never miss out.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Staying informed
Particl on Delta Direct is one of many ways to stay up-to-date with the project
and the community events. One of the cool features is that our in app PART feed
also picks up all official blog posts and specially hash-tagged tweets on our
official project and development twitter accounts.

About Delta Direct
Delta is the ultimate Bitcoin & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker app. Keep track
of all cryptocoins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin and over 3000
altcoins. Use the free app to get the latest coin prices and market charts in
your local currency and get alerts to make sure you don’t miss out on your next
crypto investment.

Thank you
Particl Team
html:
Now live to over 1 Million users on both iOS & Android!

A direct link for Token Teams to connect with existing & potential future investors. Fully free.

Delta Direct users are now subscribed to Particl news and announcements!

  • All the latest PART updates will now be directly available on Delta Direct’s applications.

Android

Delta - Bitcoin & Cryptocurrency Portfolio Tracker - Apps on Google Play
Delta is the best free Bitcoin & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker app. Track all crypto assets, including Bitcoin…play.google.com

IOS

‎Delta Crypto Portfolio Tracker
‎Read reviews, compare customer ratings, see screenshots, and learn more about Delta Crypto Portfolio Tracker. Download…itunes.apple.com

Desktop

∆ Delta - The best Bitcoin, ICO & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker
∆ Delta - The best Bitcoin, ICO & cryptocurrency portfolio trackerdelta.app

  • Make sure to enable notifications for Direct updates so you never miss out.

Staying informed

Particl on Delta Direct is one of many ways to stay up-to-date with the project and the community events. One of the cool features is that our in app PART feed also picks up all official blog posts and specially hash-tagged tweets on our official project and development twitter accounts.

About Delta Direct

Delta is the ultimate Bitcoin & cryptocurrency portfolio tracker app. Keep track of all cryptocoins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin and over 3000 altcoins. Use the free app to get the latest coin prices and market charts in your local currency and get alerts to make sure you don’t miss out on your next crypto investment.

Thank you

Particl Team
